TEXT.citation: Wikipedia contributors. (2026). Sakizaya Wikipedia. Wikimedia Foundation. Retrieved 2026-06-09, from https://szy.wikipedia.org/
TEXT.BibTeX_citation: @misc{Wiki_szy, title = {Sakizaya Wikipedia}, author = {{Wikipedia contributors}}, year = {2026}, publisher = {Wikimedia Foundation}, url = {https://szy.wikipedia.org/}, urldate = {2026-06-09} }

S.FORM: == kakiliman: == Ya-tyen-wi-cen ťõÖŚÖłŤ°õŚüé Ya-tyen-wi-cen Si-la' a kamu őĎőļŌĀŌĆŌÄőŅőĽő∑, Ing a kamu, Acropolis of Athens" i angangan a tukay nu Si-la', u singanganay a wi-cen "yaw-say-tukay". wi-cen sa nu pin-tin baetu a nisanga', tini i talakaw tu 157 mi "536 ing-ce". 157ÁĪ≥(536ŤčĪŚĎé). nilacilan: Ya-tyen-wi-cen ayza iza hena ku nipatizang pasu pinaay nu tabakiay a nipatizeng atu imi nu likisi sumamaday nipatizeng a nazipaan, zuma u singanganay u Pa-te-nen-biw. "Wi-cen" uyni a kamu makay Si-la a sulit "ŠľĄőļŌĀőŅőĹ" akron, u "satalakaway, micidekay" atu "ŌÄŌĆőĽőĻŌā ŌÄŌĆőĽőĻŌā" "polis" apatatungus. "(akron,šļ¶Áāļ"śúÄťęėťĽě,ś•ĶÁęĮ")ŚíĆ"ŌÄŌĆőĽőĻŌā" ÁöĄÁĶźŚźą. Wi-cen a kamu u malecaday tu a kamu, i sumamadan Si-la a zidayan, kanahatu Si-la iza henay yadah ku zumaay a Wi-cen, i Ya-tyen-wi-cen zuma pangangan han tu Si-ke-low-pey "Cecropi" mikining tu matudungay tu anizungaan tu pangkiw ku tademaw pangkiw ku bauay a Ya-tyen nu saayaway a hungti ci Kay-ke-low-pu-s. iza ku katahkalanmusakamu tu Ya-tyen-wi-cen saayaway i kung-yen ayaw tu sepat malebut a mihcaan izaw t uku muenenngay nu tademaw, zikuz i Pow-li-ke-li i kung-yen ayaw tu lima se-ci micuzuh tu patizeng misanga', imahini Ya-tyen-wi-cen a nazipaan kitakit nu sakahenulan a nisubeliday a macakatay nu sumamaday, matuzu' nu li-yen-he-kow cyew-ke-win sakaput u nisubeliday a zaysang lalangawan nu kitakit. sumamadan a Si-la' makay wi-cin a nakamuan nu babalaki Ya-ten tukuay a ngangan makay sitenengay tataynan a Di'tu ci Ya-ten-na a ngangan. i nakamuan nu babalaki, tademaw amin i Ay-cin dadipasan patizengn tu cacay baluhay a tukay, Ya-ten-na maydih mala midiputay a Di'tu tu nu uynian a tukay. Hay-sen-pow-say-tun maydih pakala tu misakaku tu Sincen, caay kasasulul kuheni, malaalaw tu. zikuz, u kakalayan tu ku paketunay, cama ku pabeliay tu tademawan cacay u sipucay a tuud, uyni a tukuay uyza tu ku situngusay. Pow-say-tun mitadu tu san-ca-ci mituktuk tu buhang, makay labu tahakal ku cacay mahizaay milaisay a subayu. Ya-tyen u iduc ku sapisetul tu buhang, pabaw nu baetu kalamkam sa mulangaw ku cacay tupapah sanay, malubic ku heci nu cukana. Cukana a kilang mahiza yadah ku nilangec atulihalay, lipahak sa ku tademaw amin. tademaw amin aw ngangan niza Ya-tyen apangangan tu tukay. cuwacuwaay a Ya-tyen hamin hantu paluma tu katup. ungcuyay a lala' Ś≤©Áü≥ÁöĄŚúįś¶āś≥Ā Wi-cen sa u enal nu A-ti-ka manayat katukuh maapilisay a tepad, u likut maminu tepad. tademaw amin makayza tu satipmuculi tayza, itini iza ku apuyu'ay a buyu' matatules katukuh A-lye-aw-pow-ku-s-san. nu sumilaway abu a baetu ku sapatizeng, sakasa ateka' nika macumud nu nanum. hekal nu baetu, abalas atu abu lanu' anikasahini, ahemi' ku abu a baetu nik mitena' acumuden nu nanum. mahiniay a nipatizeng mabuwahay a demdem pawapen tu kapahay a hekal, saaca sasa nu buyu' iza ku sapitena' tu buhang, mahini izaw tu ku tatangahan nu nanum, kyu mitaliyuk tu ku tademaw mueneng. tiniay saayaway kasumamadan a tuud namakayzaay teban ziday baluhay baetuaynay a ziday, nika nisulatan tu naayaway baluhay batuaynay a ziday, A-ti-ka capi iza ku muenengay nu tademaw "ayaw tu 6000 a mihcaan". yu micumud tu cin-tung a ziday zikuz, May-si-ni a May-ka-long mapatizeng i tukun nu adidi'ay a buyu',u aenengay nu May-si-ni a hungti, labu nu luma', misebengay, kuwkayay, misamukinnay atu itini amin ku binawlan mueneng. . uyni a kukay mataliyuk nu atekakay tabakiay baetuay a cabeng. "tusa a tungduh ku apuyu'ay a cabeng nu tabakiay a baetu anisannga'an patalabu han tu amutu, sisa masilac tu ku panan a cabeng nu tukay, apuyu'ay a cabeng atu sipiacingan taneng misuayaw tu kawananay nu micumuday a mingayaw." . itawya iza ku tabakiay a ninel mangela' tu ku amis wali, azih han sa mahedup tu nu lala' ku nanum. tademaw ami misakapah tu misanga' tu cacay tukal itini satu misatebun, i May-si-ni-ziday, u madiputay a tatak nu nanum kuyni, saaca i tukay u kahenulan ku kinaliwlw, pawapen tu kasaepiman a nanum. duutay zidayťĽĎśöóśôāšĽ£ Ya-tyen-wi-cen nayi' ku mahizaay nu zumaay nu May-si-ni-king-tyen mapeci' nu makatalay, saaca inayi' namapalamal anucaay tabaki ku mapeci'ay a nazipaan, uyni namakay tawyaan lalangawan a tuud a pizateng. uyni atu Ya-tyen a tademaw tu nakamuan tini maleku ku pitena' tu Tow-li-an a tademaw midebung mitatengil a mitatungus. ayza caay tu kataneng tu naayaway nu kasumamadan henay tiniay a ungcuy mahicaay ku nipatizeng, nika matineng tu tiniay namademung nu Say-long, kina tusa tu madebung nu Pi-si-te-la-tu, mialaw tu sakuwan. Saaca iza ku Cyu-men a cabeng nu tukay mahiza satip amis a kalimucu' nu tukay nu satamakiay a tatangahan nu nanum patizeng. . Pi-si-te-la-tu I satip timulan nu tukay, capi hekal nu tukay, patizeng tu A-al-te-mi-s biw, zayhan sa nu niyazu' a singku, kasumamadan biw "Ing a kamu Old Temple of Athena". mahiniay Tu-pu-bey-al-te a sakatanektek hakay tungusa uyni a bie, kaiza nu demiad saadidi'ay atu sumilaway angisngis a biw a tanaya' nika caay katineng hacica ku tenes nu demiad. . sangaleb u masasibud sa, matastas ku i sumilaway angisngis a biw hawsa, cacay talakaway baetu a biw malepu a palabang, malumayay a Pa-te-nen-biw, pakala iayaw nu kung-yen tu 490 a mihcaan, Ya-tyen i Ma-la-sung a kalpacaw makademec zikuz anipatizenga'. sakay a patatungus a patizeng, nutimula a tukay tu malumanay a nazipaan malasawadtu, i 8,000 tusa tin ku baeketuyza u P-ley-ay-bu-s abu anisanga'an a linnga patalakaw, zuma angangan macudus ku talakaw katukuh 11 mi. paysepat a mihcaan Ya-tyen mikawaw tu Ya-tyen-na a lisin, Aw-lin-pi-ke a unnukay u kahenulan a sasuazih. Pilisinan iza ku cacay a kaput makay Ya-tyen a tukay pasay Wi-cen taayaw, amicumud tu Pa-te-nen-a biw "i Pa-te-nen biw iza ku kunipitudung tu nitu'tu'an". Ya-tyen a tademaw Pey-pow-low-s a zikuc nu tatayna pazengen i Bay-ti-ya-s nu tabakiay zo a ngipen atu kim tu nitu'tuan tu tademaw ni Ya-tyen-na. Ya-tyen-wi-cen a sacumud mapangangan tu Wi-cen panan nu buyu' panan, i Wi-cen panan nu buyu' kawanan iza ku adidi'ay a Ya-tyen-na pakademecay bw. ni Bye-ti-ya-s a nitu'tu'an tu tungay a uzip nu Ya-tyen-na, namutizedng i teban nu panan nu byu'. i Wi-cenan Pa-te-nen-biw "qu tamelacay a biw ni Ya-tyen-na" i kawili a panan nu buyu' nu E-luy-ke-te-ung a biw atu hecek nu masanu tatayna. likut nu tukay iza ku ciw-sen piigian a Ti-e-ni-su-s a piigian hananay. imahini hamina nu Ya-tyen-wi-cen atu liwliw maazih ku sumamaday a tuud hatu i Wi-cen Pow-u-kwan paazih, uyni a Pow-u-kwan'tini i liwliw nu Wi-cen tu malikelunay a kitizaan, laed tu Pa-te-nen-bie 280 depah. 280ŚÖ¨Śįļ.
S.PHON: == kakir~…ĺiman: == ja-tj…ôn-wi- ¶…ôn **** ja-tj…ôn-wi- ¶…ôn si-r~…ĺa Ē~ ° a kamu ********, iŇč a kamu, a ¶ropor~…ĺis of atńß…ôns" i aŇčaŇčan a tukaj nu si-r~…ĺa Ē~ °, u siŇčaŇčanaj a wi- ¶…ôn "jaw-saj-tukaj". wi- ¶…ôn sa nu pin-tin ba…ôtu a nisaŇča Ē~ °, tini i tar~…ĺakaw tu *** mi "*** iŇč- ¶…ô". ****(*****). nir~…ĺa ¶ir~…ĺan: ja-tj…ôn-wi- ¶…ôn ajza iza ńß…ôna ku nipatizaŇč pasu pinaaj nu tabakiaj a nipatiz…ôŇč atu imi nu r~…ĺikisi sumamadaj nipatiz…ôŇč a nazipaan, zuma u siŇčaŇčanaj u pa-t…ô-n…ôn-biw. "wi- ¶…ôn" ujni a kamu makaj si-r~…ĺa a sur~…ĺit "*****" akron, u "satar~…ĺakawaj, mi ¶id…ôkaj" atu "***** *****" "por~…ĺis" apatatuŇčus. "(akron,**"***,**")*"*****" ***. wi- ¶…ôn a kamu u mar~…ĺ…ô ¶adaj tu a kamu, i sumamadan si-r~…ĺa a zidajan, kanańßatu si-r~…ĺa iza ńß…ônaj jadańß ku zumaaj a wi- ¶…ôn, i ja-tj…ôn-wi- ¶…ôn zuma paŇčaŇčan ńßan tu si-k…ô-r~…ĺow-p…ô " ¶…ô ¶ropi" mikiniŇč tu matuduŇčaj tu anizuŇčaan tu paŇčkiw ku tad…ômaw paŇčkiw ku bauaj a ja-tj…ôn nu saajawaj a ńßuŇčti ¶i kaj-k…ô-r~…ĺow-pu-s. iza ku katańßkar~…ĺanmusakamu tu ja-tj…ôn-wi- ¶…ôn saajawaj i kuŇč-j…ôn ajaw tu s…ôpat mar~…ĺ…ôbut a mińß ¶aan izaw t uku mu…ôn…ônŇčaj nu tad…ômaw, zikuz i pow-r~…ĺi-k…ô-r~…ĺi i kuŇč-j…ôn ajaw tu r~…ĺima s…ô- ¶i mi ¶uzuńß tu patiz…ôŇč misaŇča Ē~ °, imańßini ja-tj…ôn-wi- ¶…ôn a nazipaan kitakit nu sakańß…ônur~…ĺan a nisub…ôr~…ĺidaj a ma ¶akataj nu sumamadaj, matuzu Ē~ ° nu r~…ĺi-j…ôn-ńß…ô-kow ¶j…ôw-k…ô-win sakaput u nisub…ôr~…ĺidaj a zajsaŇč r~…ĺar~…ĺaŇčawan nu kitakit. sumamadan a si-r~…ĺa Ē~ ° makaj wi- ¶in a nakamuan nu babar~…ĺaki ja-t…ôn tukuaj a ŇčaŇčan makaj sit…ôn…ôŇčaj tatajnan a di Ē~ °tu ¶i ja-t…ôn-na a ŇčaŇčan. i nakamuan nu babar~…ĺaki, tad…ômaw amin i aj- ¶in dadipasan patiz…ôŇčn tu ¶a ¶aj bar~…ĺuńßaj a tukaj, ja-t…ôn-na majdińß mar~…ĺa midiputaj a di Ē~ °tu tu nu ujnian a tukaj. ńßaj-s…ôn-pow-saj-tun majdińß pakar~…ĺa tu misakaku tu sin ¶…ôn, ¶aaj kasasur~…ĺur~…ĺ kuńß…ôni, mar~…ĺaar~…ĺaw tu. zikuz, u kakar~…ĺajan tu ku pak…ôtunaj, ¶ama ku pab…ôr~…ĺiaj tu tad…ômawan ¶a ¶aj u sipu ¶aj a tuud, ujni a tukuaj ujza tu ku situŇčusaj. pow-saj-tun mitadu tu san- ¶a- ¶i mituktuk tu buńßaŇč, makaj r~…ĺabu tańßakar~…ĺ ku ¶a ¶aj mańßizaaj mir~…ĺaisaj a subaju. ja-tj…ôn u idu ¶ ku sapis…ôtur~…ĺ tu buńßaŇč, pabaw nu ba…ôtu kar~…ĺamkam sa mur~…ĺaŇčaw ku ¶a ¶aj tupapańß sanaj, mar~…ĺubi ¶ ku ńß…ô ¶i nu ¶ukana. ¶ukana a kir~…ĺaŇč mańßiza jadańß ku nir~…ĺaŇč…ô ¶ atur~…ĺińßar~…ĺaj, r~…ĺipańßak sa ku tad…ômaw amin. tad…ômaw amin aw ŇčaŇčan niza ja-tj…ôn apaŇčaŇčan tu tukaj. ¶uwa ¶uwaaj a ja-tj…ôn ńßamin ńßantu par~…ĺuma tu katup. uŇč ¶ujaj a r~…ĺar~…ĺa Ē~ ° ****** wi- ¶…ôn sa u …ônar~…ĺ nu a-ti-ka manajat katukuńß maapir~…ĺisaj a t…ôpad, u r~…ĺikut maminu t…ôpad. tad…ômaw amin makajza tu satipmu ¶ur~…ĺi tajza, itini iza ku apuju Ē~ °aj a buju Ē~ ° matatur~…ĺ…ôs katukuńß a-r~…ĺj…ô-aw-pow-ku-s-san. nu sumir~…ĺawaj abu a ba…ôtu ku sapatiz…ôŇč, sakasa at…ôka Ē~ ° nika ma ¶umud nu nanum. ńß…ôkar~…ĺ nu ba…ôtu, abar~…ĺas atu abu r~…ĺanu Ē~ ° anikasańßini, ańß…ômi Ē~ ° ku abu a ba…ôtu nik mit…ôna Ē~ ° a ¶umud…ôn nu nanum. mańßiniaj a nipatiz…ôŇč mabuwańßaj a d…ômd…ôm pawap…ôn tu kapańßaj a ńß…ôkar~…ĺ, saa ¶a sasa nu buju Ē~ ° iza ku sapit…ôna Ē~ ° tu buńßaŇč, mańßini izaw tu ku tataŇčańßan nu nanum, kju mitar~…ĺijuk tu ku tad…ômaw mu…ôn…ôŇč. tiniaj saajawaj kasumamadan a tuud namakajzaaj t…ôban zidaj bar~…ĺuńßaj ba…ôtuajnaj a zidaj, nika nisur~…ĺatan tu naajawaj bar~…ĺuńßaj batuajnaj a zidaj, a-ti-ka ¶api iza ku mu…ôn…ôŇčaj nu tad…ômaw "ajaw tu **** a mińß ¶aan". ju mi ¶umud tu ¶in-tuŇč a zidaj zikuz, maj-si-ni a maj-ka-r~…ĺoŇč mapatiz…ôŇč i tukun nu adidi Ē~ °aj a buju Ē~ °,u a…ôn…ôŇčaj nu maj-si-ni a ńßuŇčti, r~…ĺabu nu r~…ĺuma Ē~ °, mis…ôb…ôŇčaj, kuwkajaj, misamukinnaj atu itini amin ku binawr~…ĺan mu…ôn…ôŇč. . ujni a kukaj matar~…ĺijuk nu at…ôkakaj tabakiaj ba…ôtuaj a ¶ab…ôŇč. "tusa a tuŇčduńß ku apuju Ē~ °aj a ¶ab…ôŇč nu tabakiaj a ba…ôtu anisanŇča Ē~ °an patar~…ĺabu ńßan tu amutu, sisa masir~…ĺa ¶ tu ku panan a ¶ab…ôŇč nu tukaj, apuju Ē~ °aj a ¶ab…ôŇč atu sipia ¶iŇčan tan…ôŇč misuajaw tu kawananaj nu mi ¶umudaj a miŇčajaw." . itawja iza ku tabakiaj a nin…ôr~…ĺ maŇč…ôr~…ĺa Ē~ ° tu ku amis war~…ĺi, azińß ńßan sa mańß…ôdup tu nu r~…ĺar~…ĺa Ē~ ° ku nanum. tad…ômaw ami misakapańß tu misaŇča Ē~ ° tu ¶a ¶aj tukar~…ĺ itini satu misat…ôbun, i maj-si-ni-zidaj, u madiputaj a tatak nu nanum kujni, saa ¶a i tukaj u kańß…ônur~…ĺan ku kinar~…ĺiwr~…ĺw, pawap…ôn tu kasa…ôpiman a nanum. duutaj zidaj**** ja-tj…ôn-wi- ¶…ôn naji Ē~ ° ku mańßizaaj nu zumaaj nu maj-si-ni-kiŇč-tj…ôn map…ô ¶i Ē~ ° nu makatar~…ĺaj, saa ¶a inaji Ē~ ° namapar~…ĺamar~…ĺ anu ¶aaj tabaki ku map…ô ¶i Ē~ °aj a nazipaan, ujni namakaj tawjaan r~…ĺar~…ĺaŇčawan a tuud a pizat…ôŇč. ujni atu ja-tj…ôn a tad…ômaw tu nakamuan tini mar~…ĺ…ôku ku pit…ôna Ē~ ° tu tow-r~…ĺi-an a tad…ômaw mid…ôbuŇč mitat…ôŇčir~…ĺ a mitatuŇčus. ajza ¶aaj tu katan…ôŇč tu naajawaj nu kasumamadan ńß…ônaj tiniaj a uŇč ¶uj mańßi ¶aaj ku nipatiz…ôŇč, nika matin…ôŇč tu tiniaj namad…ômuŇč nu saj-r~…ĺoŇč, kina tusa tu mad…ôbuŇč nu pi-si-t…ô-r~…ĺa-tu, miar~…ĺaw tu sakuwan. saa ¶a iza ku ¶ju-m…ôn a ¶ab…ôŇč nu tukaj mańßiza satip amis a kar~…ĺimu ¶u Ē~ ° nu tukaj nu satamakiaj a tataŇčańßan nu nanum patiz…ôŇč. . pi-si-t…ô-r~…ĺa-tu i satip timur~…ĺan nu tukaj, ¶api ńß…ôkar~…ĺ nu tukaj, patiz…ôŇč tu a-ar~…ĺ-t…ô-mi-s biw, zajńßan sa nu nijazu Ē~ ° a siŇčku, kasumamadan biw "iŇč a kamu or~…ĺd t…ômpr~…ĺ…ô of atńß…ôna". mańßiniaj tu-pu-b…ô-ar~…ĺ-t…ô a sakatan…ôkt…ôk ńßakaj tuŇčusa ujni a bi…ô, kaiza nu d…ômiad saadidi Ē~ °aj atu sumir~…ĺawaj aŇčisŇčis a biw a tanaja Ē~ ° nika ¶aaj katin…ôŇč ńßa ¶i ¶a ku t…ôn…ôs nu d…ômiad. . saŇčar~…ĺ…ôb u masasibud sa, matastas ku i sumir~…ĺawaj aŇčisŇčis a biw ńßawsa, ¶a ¶aj tar~…ĺakawaj ba…ôtu a biw mar~…ĺ…ôpu a par~…ĺabaŇč, mar~…ĺumajaj a pa-t…ô-n…ôn-biw, pakar~…ĺa iajaw nu kuŇč-j…ôn tu *** a mińß ¶aan, ja-tj…ôn i ma-r~…ĺa-suŇč a kar~…ĺpa ¶aw makad…ôm…ô ¶ zikuz anipatiz…ôŇča Ē~ °. sakaj a patatuŇčus a patiz…ôŇč, nutimur~…ĺa a tukaj tu mar~…ĺumanaj a nazipaan mar~…ĺasawadtu, i *,*** tusa tin ku ba…ôk…ôtujza u p-r~…ĺ…ô-aj-bu-s abu anisaŇča Ē~ °an a r~…ĺinŇča patar~…ĺakaw, zuma aŇčaŇčan ma ¶udus ku tar~…ĺakaw katukuńß ** mi. pajs…ôpat a mińß ¶aan ja-tj…ôn mikawaw tu ja-tj…ôn-na a r~…ĺisin, aw-r~…ĺin-pi-k…ô a unnukaj u kańß…ônur~…ĺan a sasuazińß. pir~…ĺisinan iza ku ¶a ¶aj a kaput makaj ja-tj…ôn a tukaj pasaj wi- ¶…ôn taajaw, ami ¶umud tu pa-t…ô-n…ôn-a biw "i pa-t…ô-n…ôn biw iza ku kunipituduŇč tu nitu Ē~ °tu Ē~ °an". ja-tj…ôn a tad…ômaw p…ô-pow-r~…ĺow-s a ziku ¶ nu tatajna paz…ôŇč…ôn i baj-ti-ja-s nu tabakiaj zo a Ňčip…ôn atu kim tu nitu Ē~ °tuan tu tad…ômaw ni ja-tj…ôn-na. ja-tj…ôn-wi- ¶…ôn a sa ¶umud mapaŇčaŇčan tu wi- ¶…ôn panan nu buju Ē~ ° panan, i wi- ¶…ôn panan nu buju Ē~ ° kawanan iza ku adidi Ē~ °aj a ja-tj…ôn-na pakad…ôm…ô ¶aj bw. ni bj…ô-ti-ja-s a nitu Ē~ °tu Ē~ °an tu tuŇčaj a uzip nu ja-tj…ôn-na, namutiz…ôdŇč i t…ôban nu panan nu bju Ē~ °. i wi- ¶…ônan pa-t…ô-n…ôn-biw "*u tam…ôr~…ĺa ¶aj a biw ni ja-tj…ôn-na" i kawir~…ĺi a panan nu buju Ē~ ° nu …ô-r~…ĺuj-k…ô-t…ô-uŇč a biw atu ńß…ô ¶…ôk nu masanu tatajna. r~…ĺikut nu tukaj iza ku ¶iw-s…ôn piigian a ti-…ô-ni-su-s a piigian ńßananaj. imańßini ńßamina nu ja-tj…ôn-wi- ¶…ôn atu r~…ĺiwr~…ĺiw maazińß ku sumamadaj a tuud ńßatu i wi- ¶…ôn pow-u-kwan paazińß, ujni a pow-u-kwan Ē~ °tini i r~…ĺiwr~…ĺiw nu wi- ¶…ôn tu mar~…ĺik…ôr~…ĺunaj a kitizaan, r~…ĺa…ôd tu pa-t…ô-n…ôn-bi…ô *** d…ôpańß. *****.
S.FORM: == kakiliman: == Ya-tyen-wi-cen ťõÖŚÖłŤ°õŚüé Ya-tyen-wi-cen Si-la' a kamu őĎőļŌĀŌĆŌÄőŅőĽő∑, Ing a kamu, Acropolis of Athens" i angangan a tukay nu Si-la', u singanganay a wi-cen "yaw-say-tukay". wi-cen sa nu pin-tin baetu a nisanga', tini i talakaw tu 157 mi "536 ing-ce". 157ÁĪ≥(536ŤčĪŚĎé). nilacilan: Ya-tyen-wi-cen ayza iza hena ku nipatizang pasu pinaay nu tabakiay a nipatizeng atu imi nu likisi sumamaday nipatizeng a nazipaan, zuma u singanganay u Pa-te-nen-biw. "Wi-cen" uyni a kamu makay Si-la a sulit "ŠľĄőļŌĀőŅőĹ" akron, u "satalakaway, micidekay" atu "ŌÄŌĆőĽőĻŌā ŌÄŌĆőĽőĻŌā" "polis" apatatungus. "(akron,šļ¶Áāļ"śúÄťęėťĽě,ś•ĶÁęĮ")ŚíĆ"ŌÄŌĆőĽőĻŌā" ÁöĄÁĶźŚźą. Wi-cen a kamu u malecaday tu a kamu, i sumamadan Si-la a zidayan, kanahatu Si-la iza henay yadah ku zumaay a Wi-cen, i Ya-tyen-wi-cen zuma pangangan han tu Si-ke-low-pey "Cecropi" mikining tu matudungay tu anizungaan tu pangkiw ku tademaw pangkiw ku bauay a Ya-tyen nu saayaway a hungti ci Kay-ke-low-pu-s. iza ku katahkalanmusakamu tu Ya-tyen-wi-cen saayaway i kung-yen ayaw tu sepat malebut a mihcaan izaw t uku muenenngay nu tademaw, zikuz i Pow-li-ke-li i kung-yen ayaw tu lima se-ci micuzuh tu patizeng misanga', imahini Ya-tyen-wi-cen a nazipaan kitakit nu sakahenulan a nisubeliday a macakatay nu sumamaday, matuzu' nu li-yen-he-kow cyew-ke-win sakaput u nisubeliday a zaysang lalangawan nu kitakit. sumamadan a Si-la' makay wi-cin a nakamuan nu babalaki Ya-ten tukuay a ngangan makay sitenengay tataynan a Di'tu ci Ya-ten-na a ngangan. i nakamuan nu babalaki, tademaw amin i Ay-cin dadipasan patizengn tu cacay baluhay a tukay, Ya-ten-na maydih mala midiputay a Di'tu tu nu uynian a tukay. Hay-sen-pow-say-tun maydih pakala tu misakaku tu Sincen, caay kasasulul kuheni, malaalaw tu. zikuz, u kakalayan tu ku paketunay, cama ku pabeliay tu tademawan cacay u sipucay a tuud, uyni a tukuay uyza tu ku situngusay. Pow-say-tun mitadu tu san-ca-ci mituktuk tu buhang, makay labu tahakal ku cacay mahizaay milaisay a subayu. Ya-tyen u iduc ku sapisetul tu buhang, pabaw nu baetu kalamkam sa mulangaw ku cacay tupapah sanay, malubic ku heci nu cukana. Cukana a kilang mahiza yadah ku nilangec atulihalay, lipahak sa ku tademaw amin. tademaw amin aw ngangan niza Ya-tyen apangangan tu tukay. cuwacuwaay a Ya-tyen hamin hantu paluma tu katup. ungcuyay a lala' Ś≤©Áü≥ÁöĄŚúįś¶āś≥Ā Wi-cen sa u enal nu A-ti-ka manayat katukuh maapilisay a tepad, u likut maminu tepad. tademaw amin makayza tu satipmuculi tayza, itini iza ku apuyu'ay a buyu' matatules katukuh A-lye-aw-pow-ku-s-san. nu sumilaway abu a baetu ku sapatizeng, sakasa ateka' nika macumud nu nanum. hekal nu baetu, abalas atu abu lanu' anikasahini, ahemi' ku abu a baetu nik mitena' acumuden nu nanum. mahiniay a nipatizeng mabuwahay a demdem pawapen tu kapahay a hekal, saaca sasa nu buyu' iza ku sapitena' tu buhang, mahini izaw tu ku tatangahan nu nanum, kyu mitaliyuk tu ku tademaw mueneng. tiniay saayaway kasumamadan a tuud namakayzaay teban ziday baluhay baetuaynay a ziday, nika nisulatan tu naayaway baluhay batuaynay a ziday, A-ti-ka capi iza ku muenengay nu tademaw "ayaw tu 6000 a mihcaan". yu micumud tu cin-tung a ziday zikuz, May-si-ni a May-ka-long mapatizeng i tukun nu adidi'ay a buyu',u aenengay nu May-si-ni a hungti, labu nu luma', misebengay, kuwkayay, misamukinnay atu itini amin ku binawlan mueneng. . uyni a kukay mataliyuk nu atekakay tabakiay baetuay a cabeng. "tusa a tungduh ku apuyu'ay a cabeng nu tabakiay a baetu anisannga'an patalabu han tu amutu, sisa masilac tu ku panan a cabeng nu tukay, apuyu'ay a cabeng atu sipiacingan taneng misuayaw tu kawananay nu micumuday a mingayaw." . itawya iza ku tabakiay a ninel mangela' tu ku amis wali, azih han sa mahedup tu nu lala' ku nanum. tademaw ami misakapah tu misanga' tu cacay tukal itini satu misatebun, i May-si-ni-ziday, u madiputay a tatak nu nanum kuyni, saaca i tukay u kahenulan ku kinaliwlw, pawapen tu kasaepiman a nanum. duutay zidayťĽĎśöóśôāšĽ£ Ya-tyen-wi-cen nayi' ku mahizaay nu zumaay nu May-si-ni-king-tyen mapeci' nu makatalay, saaca inayi' namapalamal anucaay tabaki ku mapeci'ay a nazipaan, uyni namakay tawyaan lalangawan a tuud a pizateng. uyni atu Ya-tyen a tademaw tu nakamuan tini maleku ku pitena' tu Tow-li-an a tademaw midebung mitatengil a mitatungus. ayza caay tu kataneng tu naayaway nu kasumamadan henay tiniay a ungcuy mahicaay ku nipatizeng, nika matineng tu tiniay namademung nu Say-long, kina tusa tu madebung nu Pi-si-te-la-tu, mialaw tu sakuwan. Saaca iza ku Cyu-men a cabeng nu tukay mahiza satip amis a kalimucu' nu tukay nu satamakiay a tatangahan nu nanum patizeng. . Pi-si-te-la-tu I satip timulan nu tukay, capi hekal nu tukay, patizeng tu A-al-te-mi-s biw, zayhan sa nu niyazu' a singku, kasumamadan biw "Ing a kamu Old Temple of Athena". mahiniay Tu-pu-bey-al-te a sakatanektek hakay tungusa uyni a bie, kaiza nu demiad saadidi'ay atu sumilaway angisngis a biw a tanaya' nika caay katineng hacica ku tenes nu demiad. . sangaleb u masasibud sa, matastas ku i sumilaway angisngis a biw hawsa, cacay talakaway baetu a biw malepu a palabang, malumayay a Pa-te-nen-biw, pakala iayaw nu kung-yen tu 490 a mihcaan, Ya-tyen i Ma-la-sung a kalpacaw makademec zikuz anipatizenga'. sakay a patatungus a patizeng, nutimula a tukay tu malumanay a nazipaan malasawadtu, i 8,000 tusa tin ku baeketuyza u P-ley-ay-bu-s abu anisanga'an a linnga patalakaw, zuma angangan macudus ku talakaw katukuh 11 mi. paysepat a mihcaan Ya-tyen mikawaw tu Ya-tyen-na a lisin, Aw-lin-pi-ke a unnukay u kahenulan a sasuazih. Pilisinan iza ku cacay a kaput makay Ya-tyen a tukay pasay Wi-cen taayaw, amicumud tu Pa-te-nen-a biw "i Pa-te-nen biw iza ku kunipitudung tu nitu'tu'an". Ya-tyen a tademaw Pey-pow-low-s a zikuc nu tatayna pazengen i Bay-ti-ya-s nu tabakiay zo a ngipen atu kim tu nitu'tuan tu tademaw ni Ya-tyen-na. Ya-tyen-wi-cen a sacumud mapangangan tu Wi-cen panan nu buyu' panan, i Wi-cen panan nu buyu' kawanan iza ku adidi'ay a Ya-tyen-na pakademecay bw. ni Bye-ti-ya-s a nitu'tu'an tu tungay a uzip nu Ya-tyen-na, namutizedng i teban nu panan nu byu'. i Wi-cenan Pa-te-nen-biw "qu tamelacay a biw ni Ya-tyen-na" i kawili a panan nu buyu' nu E-luy-ke-te-ung a biw atu hecek nu masanu tatayna. likut nu tukay iza ku ciw-sen piigian a Ti-e-ni-su-s a piigian hananay. imahini hamina nu Ya-tyen-wi-cen atu liwliw maazih ku sumamaday a tuud hatu i Wi-cen Pow-u-kwan paazih, uyni a Pow-u-kwan'tini i liwliw nu Wi-cen tu malikelunay a kitizaan, laed tu Pa-te-nen-bie 280 depah. 280ŚÖ¨Śįļ.
S.PHON: == kakir~…ĺiman: == ja-tj…ôn-wi- ¶…ôn **** ja-tj…ôn-wi- ¶…ôn si-r~…ĺa Ē~ ° a kamu ********, iŇč a kamu, a ¶ropor~…ĺis of atńß…ôns" i aŇčaŇčan a tukaj nu si-r~…ĺa Ē~ °, u siŇčaŇčanaj a wi- ¶…ôn "jaw-saj-tukaj". wi- ¶…ôn sa nu pin-tin ba…ôtu a nisaŇča Ē~ °, tini i tar~…ĺakaw tu *** mi "*** iŇč- ¶…ô". ****(*****). nir~…ĺa ¶ir~…ĺan: ja-tj…ôn-wi- ¶…ôn ajza iza ńß…ôna ku nipatizaŇč pasu pinaaj nu tabakiaj a nipatiz…ôŇč atu imi nu r~…ĺikisi sumamadaj nipatiz…ôŇč a nazipaan, zuma u siŇčaŇčanaj u pa-t…ô-n…ôn-biw. "wi- ¶…ôn" ujni a kamu makaj si-r~…ĺa a sur~…ĺit "*****" akron, u "satar~…ĺakawaj, mi ¶id…ôkaj" atu "***** *****" "por~…ĺis" apatatuŇčus. "(akron,**"***,**")*"*****" ***. wi- ¶…ôn a kamu u mar~…ĺ…ô ¶adaj tu a kamu, i sumamadan si-r~…ĺa a zidajan, kanańßatu si-r~…ĺa iza ńß…ônaj jadańß ku zumaaj a wi- ¶…ôn, i ja-tj…ôn-wi- ¶…ôn zuma paŇčaŇčan ńßan tu si-k…ô-r~…ĺow-p…ô " ¶…ô ¶ropi" mikiniŇč tu matuduŇčaj tu anizuŇčaan tu paŇčkiw ku tad…ômaw paŇčkiw ku bauaj a ja-tj…ôn nu saajawaj a ńßuŇčti ¶i kaj-k…ô-r~…ĺow-pu-s. iza ku katańßkar~…ĺanmusakamu tu ja-tj…ôn-wi- ¶…ôn saajawaj i kuŇč-j…ôn ajaw tu s…ôpat mar~…ĺ…ôbut a mińß ¶aan izaw t uku mu…ôn…ônŇčaj nu tad…ômaw, zikuz i pow-r~…ĺi-k…ô-r~…ĺi i kuŇč-j…ôn ajaw tu r~…ĺima s…ô- ¶i mi ¶uzuńß tu patiz…ôŇč misaŇča Ē~ °, imańßini ja-tj…ôn-wi- ¶…ôn a nazipaan kitakit nu sakańß…ônur~…ĺan a nisub…ôr~…ĺidaj a ma ¶akataj nu sumamadaj, matuzu Ē~ ° nu r~…ĺi-j…ôn-ńß…ô-kow ¶j…ôw-k…ô-win sakaput u nisub…ôr~…ĺidaj a zajsaŇč r~…ĺar~…ĺaŇčawan nu kitakit. sumamadan a si-r~…ĺa Ē~ ° makaj wi- ¶in a nakamuan nu babar~…ĺaki ja-t…ôn tukuaj a ŇčaŇčan makaj sit…ôn…ôŇčaj tatajnan a di Ē~ °tu ¶i ja-t…ôn-na a ŇčaŇčan. i nakamuan nu babar~…ĺaki, tad…ômaw amin i aj- ¶in dadipasan patiz…ôŇčn tu ¶a ¶aj bar~…ĺuńßaj a tukaj, ja-t…ôn-na majdińß mar~…ĺa midiputaj a di Ē~ °tu tu nu ujnian a tukaj. ńßaj-s…ôn-pow-saj-tun majdińß pakar~…ĺa tu misakaku tu sin ¶…ôn, ¶aaj kasasur~…ĺur~…ĺ kuńß…ôni, mar~…ĺaar~…ĺaw tu. zikuz, u kakar~…ĺajan tu ku pak…ôtunaj, ¶ama ku pab…ôr~…ĺiaj tu tad…ômawan ¶a ¶aj u sipu ¶aj a tuud, ujni a tukuaj ujza tu ku situŇčusaj. pow-saj-tun mitadu tu san- ¶a- ¶i mituktuk tu buńßaŇč, makaj r~…ĺabu tańßakar~…ĺ ku ¶a ¶aj mańßizaaj mir~…ĺaisaj a subaju. ja-tj…ôn u idu ¶ ku sapis…ôtur~…ĺ tu buńßaŇč, pabaw nu ba…ôtu kar~…ĺamkam sa mur~…ĺaŇčaw ku ¶a ¶aj tupapańß sanaj, mar~…ĺubi ¶ ku ńß…ô ¶i nu ¶ukana. ¶ukana a kir~…ĺaŇč mańßiza jadańß ku nir~…ĺaŇč…ô ¶ atur~…ĺińßar~…ĺaj, r~…ĺipańßak sa ku tad…ômaw amin. tad…ômaw amin aw ŇčaŇčan niza ja-tj…ôn apaŇčaŇčan tu tukaj. ¶uwa ¶uwaaj a ja-tj…ôn ńßamin ńßantu par~…ĺuma tu katup. uŇč ¶ujaj a r~…ĺar~…ĺa Ē~ ° ****** wi- ¶…ôn sa u …ônar~…ĺ nu a-ti-ka manajat katukuńß maapir~…ĺisaj a t…ôpad, u r~…ĺikut maminu t…ôpad. tad…ômaw amin makajza tu satipmu ¶ur~…ĺi tajza, itini iza ku apuju Ē~ °aj a buju Ē~ ° matatur~…ĺ…ôs katukuńß a-r~…ĺj…ô-aw-pow-ku-s-san. nu sumir~…ĺawaj abu a ba…ôtu ku sapatiz…ôŇč, sakasa at…ôka Ē~ ° nika ma ¶umud nu nanum. ńß…ôkar~…ĺ nu ba…ôtu, abar~…ĺas atu abu r~…ĺanu Ē~ ° anikasańßini, ańß…ômi Ē~ ° ku abu a ba…ôtu nik mit…ôna Ē~ ° a ¶umud…ôn nu nanum. mańßiniaj a nipatiz…ôŇč mabuwańßaj a d…ômd…ôm pawap…ôn tu kapańßaj a ńß…ôkar~…ĺ, saa ¶a sasa nu buju Ē~ ° iza ku sapit…ôna Ē~ ° tu buńßaŇč, mańßini izaw tu ku tataŇčańßan nu nanum, kju mitar~…ĺijuk tu ku tad…ômaw mu…ôn…ôŇč. tiniaj saajawaj kasumamadan a tuud namakajzaaj t…ôban zidaj bar~…ĺuńßaj ba…ôtuajnaj a zidaj, nika nisur~…ĺatan tu naajawaj bar~…ĺuńßaj batuajnaj a zidaj, a-ti-ka ¶api iza ku mu…ôn…ôŇčaj nu tad…ômaw "ajaw tu **** a mińß ¶aan". ju mi ¶umud tu ¶in-tuŇč a zidaj zikuz, maj-si-ni a maj-ka-r~…ĺoŇč mapatiz…ôŇč i tukun nu adidi Ē~ °aj a buju Ē~ °,u a…ôn…ôŇčaj nu maj-si-ni a ńßuŇčti, r~…ĺabu nu r~…ĺuma Ē~ °, mis…ôb…ôŇčaj, kuwkajaj, misamukinnaj atu itini amin ku binawr~…ĺan mu…ôn…ôŇč. . ujni a kukaj matar~…ĺijuk nu at…ôkakaj tabakiaj ba…ôtuaj a ¶ab…ôŇč. "tusa a tuŇčduńß ku apuju Ē~ °aj a ¶ab…ôŇč nu tabakiaj a ba…ôtu anisanŇča Ē~ °an patar~…ĺabu ńßan tu amutu, sisa masir~…ĺa ¶ tu ku panan a ¶ab…ôŇč nu tukaj, apuju Ē~ °aj a ¶ab…ôŇč atu sipia ¶iŇčan tan…ôŇč misuajaw tu kawananaj nu mi ¶umudaj a miŇčajaw." . itawja iza ku tabakiaj a nin…ôr~…ĺ maŇč…ôr~…ĺa Ē~ ° tu ku amis war~…ĺi, azińß ńßan sa mańß…ôdup tu nu r~…ĺar~…ĺa Ē~ ° ku nanum. tad…ômaw ami misakapańß tu misaŇča Ē~ ° tu ¶a ¶aj tukar~…ĺ itini satu misat…ôbun, i maj-si-ni-zidaj, u madiputaj a tatak nu nanum kujni, saa ¶a i tukaj u kańß…ônur~…ĺan ku kinar~…ĺiwr~…ĺw, pawap…ôn tu kasa…ôpiman a nanum. duutaj zidaj**** ja-tj…ôn-wi- ¶…ôn naji Ē~ ° ku mańßizaaj nu zumaaj nu maj-si-ni-kiŇč-tj…ôn map…ô ¶i Ē~ ° nu makatar~…ĺaj, saa ¶a inaji Ē~ ° namapar~…ĺamar~…ĺ anu ¶aaj tabaki ku map…ô ¶i Ē~ °aj a nazipaan, ujni namakaj tawjaan r~…ĺar~…ĺaŇčawan a tuud a pizat…ôŇč. ujni atu ja-tj…ôn a tad…ômaw tu nakamuan tini mar~…ĺ…ôku ku pit…ôna Ē~ ° tu tow-r~…ĺi-an a tad…ômaw mid…ôbuŇč mitat…ôŇčir~…ĺ a mitatuŇčus. ajza ¶aaj tu katan…ôŇč tu naajawaj nu kasumamadan ńß…ônaj tiniaj a uŇč ¶uj mańßi ¶aaj ku nipatiz…ôŇč, nika matin…ôŇč tu tiniaj namad…ômuŇč nu saj-r~…ĺoŇč, kina tusa tu mad…ôbuŇč nu pi-si-t…ô-r~…ĺa-tu, miar~…ĺaw tu sakuwan. saa ¶a iza ku ¶ju-m…ôn a ¶ab…ôŇč nu tukaj mańßiza satip amis a kar~…ĺimu ¶u Ē~ ° nu tukaj nu satamakiaj a tataŇčańßan nu nanum patiz…ôŇč. . pi-si-t…ô-r~…ĺa-tu i satip timur~…ĺan nu tukaj, ¶api ńß…ôkar~…ĺ nu tukaj, patiz…ôŇč tu a-ar~…ĺ-t…ô-mi-s biw, zajńßan sa nu nijazu Ē~ ° a siŇčku, kasumamadan biw "iŇč a kamu or~…ĺd t…ômpr~…ĺ…ô of atńß…ôna". mańßiniaj tu-pu-b…ô-ar~…ĺ-t…ô a sakatan…ôkt…ôk ńßakaj tuŇčusa ujni a bi…ô, kaiza nu d…ômiad saadidi Ē~ °aj atu sumir~…ĺawaj aŇčisŇčis a biw a tanaja Ē~ ° nika ¶aaj katin…ôŇč ńßa ¶i ¶a ku t…ôn…ôs nu d…ômiad. . saŇčar~…ĺ…ôb u masasibud sa, matastas ku i sumir~…ĺawaj aŇčisŇčis a biw ńßawsa, ¶a ¶aj tar~…ĺakawaj ba…ôtu a biw mar~…ĺ…ôpu a par~…ĺabaŇč, mar~…ĺumajaj a pa-t…ô-n…ôn-biw, pakar~…ĺa iajaw nu kuŇč-j…ôn tu *** a mińß ¶aan, ja-tj…ôn i ma-r~…ĺa-suŇč a kar~…ĺpa ¶aw makad…ôm…ô ¶ zikuz anipatiz…ôŇča Ē~ °. sakaj a patatuŇčus a patiz…ôŇč, nutimur~…ĺa a tukaj tu mar~…ĺumanaj a nazipaan mar~…ĺasawadtu, i *,*** tusa tin ku ba…ôk…ôtujza u p-r~…ĺ…ô-aj-bu-s abu anisaŇča Ē~ °an a r~…ĺinŇča patar~…ĺakaw, zuma aŇčaŇčan ma ¶udus ku tar~…ĺakaw katukuńß ** mi. pajs…ôpat a mińß ¶aan ja-tj…ôn mikawaw tu ja-tj…ôn-na a r~…ĺisin, aw-r~…ĺin-pi-k…ô a unnukaj u kańß…ônur~…ĺan a sasuazińß. pir~…ĺisinan iza ku ¶a ¶aj a kaput makaj ja-tj…ôn a tukaj pasaj wi- ¶…ôn taajaw, ami ¶umud tu pa-t…ô-n…ôn-a biw "i pa-t…ô-n…ôn biw iza ku kunipituduŇč tu nitu Ē~ °tu Ē~ °an". ja-tj…ôn a tad…ômaw p…ô-pow-r~…ĺow-s a ziku ¶ nu tatajna paz…ôŇč…ôn i baj-ti-ja-s nu tabakiaj zo a Ňčip…ôn atu kim tu nitu Ē~ °tuan tu tad…ômaw ni ja-tj…ôn-na. ja-tj…ôn-wi- ¶…ôn a sa ¶umud mapaŇčaŇčan tu wi- ¶…ôn panan nu buju Ē~ ° panan, i wi- ¶…ôn panan nu buju Ē~ ° kawanan iza ku adidi Ē~ °aj a ja-tj…ôn-na pakad…ôm…ô ¶aj bw. ni bj…ô-ti-ja-s a nitu Ē~ °tu Ē~ °an tu tuŇčaj a uzip nu ja-tj…ôn-na, namutiz…ôdŇč i t…ôban nu panan nu bju Ē~ °. i wi- ¶…ônan pa-t…ô-n…ôn-biw "*u tam…ôr~…ĺa ¶aj a biw ni ja-tj…ôn-na" i kawir~…ĺi a panan nu buju Ē~ ° nu …ô-r~…ĺuj-k…ô-t…ô-uŇč a biw atu ńß…ô ¶…ôk nu masanu tatajna. r~…ĺikut nu tukaj iza ku ¶iw-s…ôn piigian a ti-…ô-ni-su-s a piigian ńßananaj. imańßini ńßamina nu ja-tj…ôn-wi- ¶…ôn atu r~…ĺiwr~…ĺiw maazińß ku sumamadaj a tuud ńßatu i wi- ¶…ôn pow-u-kwan paazińß, ujni a pow-u-kwan Ē~ °tini i r~…ĺiwr~…ĺiw nu wi- ¶…ôn tu mar~…ĺik…ôr~…ĺunaj a kitizaan, r~…ĺa…ôd tu pa-t…ô-n…ôn-bi…ô *** d…ôpańß. *****.
